title: Health News Jun 29 — Osteopenia is silently weakening bones in mil
description: Breaking news in the world of health: millions of people are silently developing a condition that's weakening their bones, and it's not just about osteoporosis. Osteopenia is a common but often overlooked condition that causes bones to become less dense and more fragile, and because it develops silently, many people only discover they have it after a fracture or bone scan. This is a major concern, especially as we age, because it can lead to a higher risk of fractures and osteoporosis. The good ...
